title: Honest Broker Console
description: The Honest Broker Console enables privacy-preserving research data releases. Super-admins can create de-identification campaigns, define patient cohorts to release, and track all data-sharing transactions for HIPAA-compliant audit trails.
tips: Campaigns define the scope of a data release — each campaign is associated with a specific cohort and purpose.
All de-identification steps (date shifting, ID removal, quasi-identifier suppression) are applied automatically per campaign policy.
The audit log records every data access event including who initiated the release and when.
Only super-admins can create or approve campaigns; researchers can only request access.
Use the 'Refresh' button to sync the latest campaign statuses from the queue.
